title: nyctocalos cuspidatum
intro: Nyctocalos cuspidatum, also known as the "night-blooming jasmine of the Himalayas", is a flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Nyctocalos cuspidatum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
